metadata.description: MCP server for Zillow — search listings, fetch property details, Zestimate history, saved searches & homes, market reports. Routes through the user's signed-in zillow.com tab via the fetchproxy browser extension, reusing the user's existing authenticated session.

plugins.name: zillow-mcp
plugins.description: MCP server for Zillow — search listings, get property details, Zestimate history, saved searches & homes, market reports
